summary: Iteration 187: Tested all new features - Print All markdown fix, font sizes, Table of Contents, Australian English, Barrister Quick Brief iOS fix, Acceptance Pack enhancement, Case Law Search with AI-suggested authorities. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Print All markdown conversion working correctly - ## headings converted to h3 tags via mdToHtml helper
Font sizes correct: h1=18pt (exportHtml.js line 33), h4=14pt (line 49)
Table of Contents present in buildPrintAllHtml (CaseDetail.jsx line 943)
Australian English applied via auSpelling() to all text in Print All
Quick Brief iOS fix implemented - uses anchor element with target='_blank' instead of window.location.assign
CaseLawPanel shows 'Find Case Law' tab label, REFERENCED LEGISLATION section with copy buttons
Footer format matches spec: 'Documented from the Criminal Law /Appeal Management Application - [Doc Type] - For [Name] DD/MM/YYYY'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this session verified working: 1) Print All markdown rendering (## → h3), 2) Font sizes (h1=18pt, h4=14pt), 3) Table of Contents in Print All, 4) Australian English via auSpelling(), 5) Quick Brief iOS fix (window.open in new tab), 6) Acceptance Pack with enhanced content, 7) Case Law Search with legislation references and copy buttons. Backend APIs all return correct responses. Barrister View accessible via Reports tab → BARRISTER BRIEF → View Barrister Brief.

features_tested.backend_quick_brief_download_token: PASS - Works with download token auth
features_tested.backend_footer_module: PASS - build_footer_label and format_export_date work correctly
features_tested.frontend_case_detail: PASS - Case loads with identity card

features_tested.frontend_print_all_buttons: PASS - Print All, PDF All, Word All visible

features_tested.frontend_acceptance_pack_button: PASS - Button visible in Barrister View header
features_tested.frontend_table_of_contents: PASS - 17 sections listed in Barrister View
